name: amazon-listing-crawler
description: Reliably crawl Amazon.com Listing pages with a persistent US browser context and diagnostic evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Crawl Amazon US Listings with persistent sessions
interface.longDescription: Collect structured Amazon.com product data by ASIN or URL using Chrome, a persistent US browser context, challenge diagnostics, raw HTML, and screenshot evidence.
defaultPrompt: Crawl this Amazon US ASIN and save structured evidence.
Diagnose why this Amazon Listing crawl is blocked.
Extract title, price, availability, rating, and bullets from this Listing.
